records.ety: [F. mtallurgie, fr. L. metallum metal, Gr. <?/ a mine + the root of <?/ work. See Metal, and Work.]

defs: The art of working metals, comprehending the whole process of separating them from other matters in the ore, smelting, refining, and parting them; sometimes, in a narrower sense, only the process of extracting metals from their ores.
